## SECTION 1: BUSINESS FLOW ARBITER RULES (CF-751–CF-788)

### GROUP A — CANONICAL SPEC INTEGRITY (CF-751–CF-755)

**CF-751: Source → Canonical Lineage Required**
```
ID: CF-751
NAME: Source → Canonical Lineage Required
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: CanonicalSkillSpec, SourceSkill
RULE: Every CanonicalSkillSpec MUST record its sourceSkillId (F1435:ISkillLineageTrackerService).
      A spec without lineage cannot be registered in F1430.
CONFLICT: Spec registered without sourceSkillId
DETECTION: F1435 checks for null/empty sourceSkillId before F1429.StoreDocument
RESOLUTION: Abort spec creation; require sourceSkillId before retry
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-752: No Duplicate Canonical Families**
```
ID: CF-752
NAME: No Duplicate Canonical Families
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: CanonicalSkillSpec, SkillFamily
RULE: One family = one canonical spec. Cannot create second canonical spec for same familyId.
CONFLICT: Attempt to create CanonicalSkillSpec when familyId already has a spec at version != patch
DETECTION: F1430 registry check before F1429.StoreDocument
RESOLUTION: Create new version of existing spec; do not duplicate family
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-753: No API Route Conflicts Between Language Variants**
```
ID: CF-753
NAME: No API Route Conflicts Between Language Variants
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ServerVariant, APIRoute
RULE: Node, Go, Java, Rust, PHP variants of the same skill family MUST expose identical API route shapes.
      /api/dynamic/{tenantId}/{action} — path structure must be the same.
CONFLICT: Go variant exposes /api/v1/go/{tenantId}/{action} — different path from Python variant
DETECTION: F1469:IApiConformanceCheckerService compares route paths across variants
RESOLUTION: Generator must enforce DynamicRouter pattern (SK-357/148/149/150/151)
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-754: DynamicRouter Required — No Entity-Specific Routes**
```
ID: CF-754
NAME: DynamicRouter Required — No Entity-Specific Routes
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ServerVariant, APIRoute
RULE: All generated server variants MUST use DynamicRouter pattern.
      No entity-specific route files (e.g., /api/orders, /api/customers) are permitted.
CONFLICT: Generated Java adapter creates @RestController OrderController with /api/orders
DETECTION: AF-7 static analysis; F1447:IAdapterDNAComplianceService
RESOLUTION: Merge into single @RestController with /{tenantId}/dynamic/{action}
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-755: Canonical Spec Version Before Variant Generation**
```
ID: CF-755
NAME: Canonical Spec Version Before Variant Generation
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: CanonicalSkillSpec, ServerVariant, ClientVariant
RULE: T546–T554 (variant generation) MUST NOT start if T543 (extraction) has not produced a valid spec.
CONFLICT: T547 (Go variant) triggered before T543 completes
DETECTION: F1480:IMultiTargetTranslationOrchestratorService checks T543 status in trace (F1481)
RESOLUTION: Hold T547 in QUEUE FABRIC until T543 publishes CanonicalSpecReady event
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

---

### GROUP B — FABRIC PURITY RULES (CF-756–CF-762)

**CF-756: No Direct Database Driver in Generated Adapters**
```
ID: CF-756
NAME: No Direct Database Driver in Generated Adapters
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ServerVariant, FabricInterface
RULE: Generated server adapters (T546–T550) MUST NOT import or instantiate DB drivers directly.
      Node: no require('pg'), require('mysql2'), require('ioredis')
      Go: no pgx.Connect(), no go-redis.NewClient()
      Java: no JdbcTemplate(), no DataSource()
      Rust: no sqlx::PgPool::connect()
      PHP: no PDO(), no mysqli()
CONFLICT: Any detected direct driver import in generated code
DETECTION: AF-7 static analysis (regex + AST scan for known driver identifiers)
RESOLUTION: Replace with fabric interface call; regenerate via AF-1 with corrected prompt
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-757: No Direct AI Provider Import in Generated Code**
```
ID: CF-757
NAME: No Direct AI Provider Import in Generated Code
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ServerVariant, AIFabric
RULE: Generated code MUST NOT import openai, anthropic, or other AI SDKs directly.
      Always through IAiProvider.GenerateAsync via AI ENGINE FABRIC.
CONFLICT: Generated Node adapter: const { OpenAI } = require('openai')
DETECTION: AF-7 static analysis
RESOLUTION: Replace with IAiProvider call
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-758: No Typed Models in Generated Server Adapters**
```
ID: CF-758
NAME: No Typed Models in Generated Server Adapters
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ServerVariant, DocumentPattern
RULE: Generated server adapters MUST use dictionary/map types for ALL domain documents.
      Node: plain {} — not class instances
      Go: map[str]interface{} — not domain structs
      Java: Map<str,Object> — not @Entity POJOs
      Rust: HashMap<str, serde_json::Value> — not domain structs
      PHP: PHP array (json_decode with true) — not class objects
CONFLICT: Generated Java adapter: Order order = Order(...)
DETECTION: AF-7 static analysis; F1447:IAdapterDNAComplianceService
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-759: No Hardcoded API Endpoints in Client Adapters**

ID: CF-759
NAME: No Hardcoded API Endpoints in Client Adapters
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ClientVariant, FabricFirst
RULE: Generated client adapters (T552–T554) MUST use config-driven API base URL.
      NEVER hardcode API endpoint strings.
CONFLICT: React hook: const API = 'https:# api.xiigen.com/...' (hardcoded)
DETECTION: AF-7 static analysis; str literal URL pattern detection
RESOLUTION: Replace with useFabricClient() or environment-driven config
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-760: tenantId Source — Auth Context Only**
```
ID: CF-760
NAME: tenantId Source — Auth Context Only
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ClientVariant, ServerVariant, TenantScope
RULE: tenantId MUST come from auth context in ALL variants (client and server).
      Client: from auth hook/context — never from form input field
      Server: from JWT middleware / route param validated by auth — never from request body
CONFLICT: React form has <input name="tenantId" /> and uses that value directly
DETECTION: AF-8 security scan; form field name inspection
RESOLUTION: Remove form field; source from auth context
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-761: No unsafe{} Blocks in Rust Adapters**

ID: CF-761
NAME: No unsafe{} Blocks in Rust Adapters
FLOW: FLOW-34

CONFLICT: Rust adapter: unsafe { ... raw pointer operation ... }

```

### GROUP C — WORDPRESS PACKAGING RULES (CF-763–CF-774)

NAME: Settings API on admin_init Only

      Not on init, plugins_loaded, or any other hook.
CONFLICT: Plugin calls register_setting() on plugins_loaded hook

**CF-765: Block Registration on Both Server and Client**
```
ID: CF-765
NAME: Block Registration on Both Server and Client
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, GutenbergBlock
RULE: Gutenberg blocks MUST be registered on BOTH server (PHP: register_block_type) and client (JS: registerBlockType).
      Omitting either = incomplete block support.
CONFLICT: Plugin registers block in JS only; no PHP server registration
DETECTION: AF-7 checks for both register_block_type call (PHP) and registerBlockType call (JS index file)
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-766: WordPress Plugin — Zero Business Logic**
```
ID: CF-766
NAME: WordPress Plugin — Zero Business Logic
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, BusinessLogic
RULE: WordPress plugin variant MUST contain ZERO business logic.
      Allowed: Settings API, block registration, REST proxy to XIIGen API.
      NOT allowed: Database queries (direct), processing algorithms, data transformations.
CONFLICT: Plugin PHP file contains: $wpdb->query("SELECT * FROM orders WHERE ...")
DETECTION: AF-7 scans for direct DB calls ($wpdb, PDO, mysqli)
RESOLUTION: Remove business logic; route to XIIGen API via REST proxy (F1454)
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-767: REST permission_callback Required**
```
ID: CF-767
NAME: REST permission_callback Required
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, RESTAPI
RULE: ALL register_rest_route() calls MUST include permission_callback.
      __return_true is acceptable ONLY for explicitly public endpoints (documented in code comment).
CONFLICT: register_rest_route('xiigen/v1', '/action', ['callback' => $handler]) — missing permission_callback
DETECTION: AF-7 and AF-8 scan all register_rest_route calls for permission_callback key
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-768: WordPress — No Secrets in PHP or Options**
```
ID: CF-768
NAME: WordPress — No Secrets in PHP or Options
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, WordPressTheme, Security
RULE: No API keys, tokens, passwords, or connection strings may be stored in:
      - PHP source files
      - WordPress wp_options table via plugin
      - Client JS bundles
      API base URL in wp_options is acceptable. Auth tokens must use secure transient or server-managed.
CONFLICT: Plugin stores 'xiigen_api_key' → 'sk-1234...' in wp_options
DETECTION: AF-8 security scan; pattern matching for known secret formats
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-769: theme.json as Only Global Style Mechanism**
```
ID: CF-769
NAME: theme.json as Only Global Style Mechanism
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressTheme
RULE: WordPress theme variants MUST use theme.json as the ONLY mechanism for global settings and styles.
      No wp_enqueue_style() for global design tokens.
CONFLICT: Theme enqueues global-styles.css with hardcoded color variables
DETECTION: AF-7 checks functions.php for wp_enqueue_style with global token patterns
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-770: WordPress Theme — Zero Business Logic**
```
ID: CF-770
NAME: WordPress Theme — Zero Business Logic
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressTheme
RULE: WordPress theme MUST contain ZERO business logic.
      If REST proxy needed: companion plugin must be declared.
CONFLICT: Theme's functions.php queries $wpdb directly
DETECTION: AF-7 scans for $wpdb in theme PHP files
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-771: Nonce Validation on WP Admin Forms**
```
ID: CF-771
NAME: Nonce Validation on WP Admin Forms
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, Security
RULE: All admin form submissions in generated WordPress plugin MUST validate nonce using wp_verify_nonce() or check_admin_referer().
CONFLICT: Settings page form submission handler missing wp_verify_nonce()
DETECTION: AF-8 security scan on settings form handlers
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-772: wp-scripts Build Required for Plugin Blocks**
```
ID: CF-772
NAME: wp-scripts Build Required for Plugin Blocks
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, GutenbergBlock, Build
RULE: Plugin blocks MUST use @wordpress/scripts (wp-scripts) for build.
      Output: build/index.js + build/index.asset.php (dependency manifest).
CONFLICT: Plugin block uses custom webpack config without generating index.asset.php
DETECTION: T556 packaging gate checks for index.asset.php in build output
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-773: Template Structure — WordPress Theme**
```
ID: CF-773
NAME: Template Structure — WordPress Theme
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressTheme, Templates
RULE: Block theme templates MUST be in templates/ folder.
      Template parts MUST be in parts/ folder.
      Inline templates in functions.php are not permitted.
CONFLICT: Theme includes page template in functions.php as str
DETECTION: AF-7 checks theme directory structure
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-774: WordPress REST Proxy — XIIGen API Only**
```
ID: CF-774
NAME: WordPress REST Proxy — XIIGen API Only
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, RESTProxy
RULE: Plugin REST proxy endpoints MUST only call the XIIGen API gateway.
      Direct calls to third-party APIs, databases, or other backends are prohibited.
CONFLICT: Plugin REST proxy calls aws.amazonaws.com directly
DETECTION: AF-8 scans wp_remote_post/get targets for non-XIIGen URLs
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

### GROUP D — CROSS-VARIANT CONFORMANCE RULES (CF-775–CF-781)

**CF-775: Conformance Suite Required Before Promotion**
```
ID: CF-775
NAME: Conformance Suite Required Before Promotion
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: SkillVariant, ConformanceSuite, PromotionLadder
RULE: No variant can advance beyond GENERATED without passing T559 (cross-variant conformance runner).
      Promotion gate (T560) MUST block until conformance = 100%.
CONFLICT: Variant promoted to INJECTED with conformanceScore = 0.87
DETECTION: F1476:IVariantPromotionGateService checks conformanceScore from F1440
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-776: idempotency Semantics Consistent Across Variants**
```
ID: CF-776
NAME: idempotency Semantics Consistent Across Variants
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: SkillVariant, Idempotency
RULE: Same idempotencyKey submitted twice MUST produce identical result across ALL server variants of the same family.
      Server variants CANNOT differ in idempotency behavior.
CONFLICT: Node variant returns 200 on retry; Rust variant returns 409 Conflict
DETECTION: GT-03 (idempotency) in canonical test suite; T551 cross-language judge
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-777: DataProcessResult Envelope Consistent Across Variants**
```
ID: CF-777
NAME: DataProcessResult Envelope Consistent Across Variants
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: SkillVariant, DataProcessResult
RULE: All server variants MUST return DataProcessResult-equivalent envelope.
      Shape: { isSuccess: bool, data: map/null, error: str/null }
      isSuccess=false for business errors (never HTTP 500 for business logic).
CONFLICT: Java variant throws RuntimeException for missing field; returns HTTP 500
DETECTION: T551 judge; AF-9 quality gate
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-778: Canonical Test Suite Frozen During Active Variant Generation**
```
ID: CF-778
NAME: Canonical Test Suite Frozen During Active Variant Generation
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ConformanceSuite, SkillVariant
RULE: The canonical test suite (created by T545) MUST NOT be modified while any variant generation (T546–T554) is in progress for the same family.
CONFLICT: Admin updates golden test vectors while T547 (Go) variant is still generating
DETECTION: F1466 orchestrator checks suite lock state; family lock via QUEUE FABRIC
RESOLUTION: Queue suite update; apply after active generation complete
SEVERITY: WARN + QUEUE_HOLD
```

**CF-779: Variant Cannot Target Multiple Languages in Single Bundle**
```
ID: CF-779
NAME: Variant Cannot Target Multiple Languages in Single Bundle
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ServerVariant
RULE: A single variant bundle MUST target exactly ONE server language. No polyglot bundles.
      Cross-language orchestration happens at the fabric level, not within a variant.
CONFLICT: Generated bundle attempts to include both Go and Java service files
DETECTION: F1448 validates artifact manifest has single targetServer value
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-780: Cross-Flow Entity Conflict — Existing T1–T246 Flows Unchanged**
```
ID: CF-780
NAME: Cross-Flow Entity Conflict — Existing Flows Unchanged
FLOW: FLOW-34 cross-check with FLOW-01 through FLOW-17
ENTITIES: AllFlows
RULE: FLOW-34 factories (F1429–F1483), task types (T543–T564), and BFA rules (CF-751–CF-788) MUST NOT modify or override any artifact from FLOW-01 through FLOW-17.
CONFLICT: FLOW-34 redefines F1438 (already reserved — check registry)
DETECTION: F1430 registry duplicate check; session state file bounds verification
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-781: Graph RAG Only After INJECTED Status**
```
ID: CF-781
NAME: Graph RAG Only After INJECTED Status
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: SkillVariant, GraphRAG
RULE: T561 (Graph RAG node ingestion) MUST NOT run for any variant below INJECTED status.
      Graph should only contain stable, tested variants.
CONFLICT: GENERATED-status variant ingested into graph; graph contaminated with unstable data
DETECTION: F1471:IGraphSkillIndexService checks F1440 for maturity level before ingestion
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

---

### GROUP E — SECURITY AND SCOPE RULES (CF-782–CF-788)

**CF-782: tenantId on ALL Variant Operations**
```
ID: CF-782
NAME: tenantId on ALL Variant Operations
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: AllVariants, TenantScope
RULE: Every database query, queue publish, cache operation in ALL generated variants MUST include tenantId as a filter/scope.
      No cross-tenant data leakage is permitted.
CONFLICT: Go variant performs IDatabaseService.SearchDocuments without tenantId in filter
DETECTION: AF-7 compliance check; F1447 DNA-5 scan
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-783: No Secrets in Any Client Bundle**
```
ID: CF-783
NAME: No Secrets in Any Client Bundle
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: ClientVariant, Security
RULE: No API keys, tokens, passwords, or connection strings in any generated client bundle.
      Applies to: React, Vue, Angular bundles, WordPress plugin JS, WordPress theme files.
CONFLICT: React bundle contains process.env.XIIGEN_SECRET_KEY (secret leaked via bundler)
DETECTION: AF-8 security scan; pattern matching for known secret formats + env  names
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-784: WordPress API Auth — No Raw Keys in Plugin**
```
ID: CF-784
NAME: WordPress API Auth — No Raw Keys in Plugin
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressPlugin, Security
RULE: WordPress plugin MUST NOT store raw API keys. Auth strategy must use:
      Option A: WordPress Application Passwords (user-scoped)
      Option B: OAuth token in encrypted transient
      Option C: Server-managed JWT via XIIGen gateway
CONFLICT: Plugin stores 'xiigen_secret' → 'sk-live-abc...' in wp_options
DETECTION: AF-8 security scan; wp_options key inspection
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-785: Variant Promotion Audit Immutable**
```
ID: CF-785
NAME: Variant Promotion Audit Immutable
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: VariantPromotion, AuditTrail
RULE: Promotion audit records (F1479) are append-only. Rollback does not delete promotion records — it adds a new ROLLBACK record.
CONFLICT: Attempt to delete promotion record after failed CORE promotion
DETECTION: F1479 configured as append-only ES index (no delete operations allowed)
SEVERITY: SYSTEM_ERROR (violates immutability contract)
```

**CF-786: CORE Promotion Requires Human Approval**
```
ID: CF-786
NAME: CORE Promotion Requires Human Approval
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: SkillVariant, PromotionLadder
RULE: Promotion from MINIMAL → CORE MUST require explicit human approval via admin interface.
      Automated pipeline CANNOT execute CORE promotion unilaterally.
CONFLICT: Automated promotion job promotes variant to CORE without human review
DETECTION: F1477 checks for approved_by field (human actor) before CORE transition
RESOLUTION: Publish PromotionPendingApproval event; wait for human confirmation
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-787: CloudEvents Required for All Async Variant Events**
```
ID: CF-787
NAME: CloudEvents Required for All Async Variant Events
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: AllVariants, EventEnvelope
RULE: All async events published by generated variants MUST use CloudEvents envelope (SK-368).
      Required attributes: id, source, specversion, type.
CONFLICT: Node variant publishes bare JSON event without CloudEvents wrapper
DETECTION: F1470 validates event shape before queue publish (T559 conformance)
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

**CF-788: WordPress Theme Cannot Reference Removed Plugin**
```
ID: CF-788
NAME: WordPress Theme Cannot Reference Removed Plugin
FLOW: FLOW-34
ENTITIES: WordPressTheme, WordPressPlugin
RULE: If WordPress theme variant declares dependency on a companion plugin (CF-770), that plugin variant MUST exist and be at INJECTED or above before theme can be promoted.
CONFLICT: Theme variant promoted to INJECTED; companion plugin variant still at GENERATED
DETECTION: F1477 checks companion plugin status during theme promotion gate
SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

## SECTION 2: STRESS TESTS (ST-463–ST-497)

### ST-463: Multi-Language Idempotency Convergence
```
TEST: ST-463
NAME: Multi-Language Idempotency Convergence
TESTS: CF-776, T551
SCENARIO: Submit same payload with same idempotencyKey to Node, Go, Java, Rust, PHP variants simultaneously.
EXPECTED: All variants return identical isSuccess=true, same data structure. All subsequent retries return identical responses.
FAILURE MODE: Any variant returns different isSuccess or different error semantics.
RECOVERY: AF-9 judge identifies divergent variant; hold at GENERATED; regenerate via AF-1 with corrected prompt.
```

### ST-464: WordPress Plugin — Direct DB Injection Attempt
```
TEST: ST-464
NAME: WordPress Plugin Direct DB Injection Attempt
TESTS: CF-766, CF-767
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates WordPress plugin. Injected malicious prompt tries to add $wpdb->query() call inside plugin.
EXPECTED: AF-7 static analysis catches $wpdb direct call. AF-9 rejects. Plugin regenerated.
FAILURE MODE: $wpdb call passes into packaged ZIP.
RECOVERY: CF-766 BUILD_FAILURE triggers; plugin regeneration queued.
```

### ST-465: Secret Injection into React Bundle
```
TEST: ST-465
NAME: Secret Injection into React Bundle
TESTS: CF-783, CF-759
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates React hook with hardcoded API key str embedded.
EXPECTED: AF-8 detects secret pattern; SK-375 gate fails; BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: API key included in npm bundle.
RECOVERY: Regenerate with SK-375 enforced; key replaced with useFabricClient() call.
```

### ST-466: tenantId Cross-Contamination — Go Variant
```
TEST: ST-466
NAME: tenantId Cross-Contamination — Go Variant
TESTS: CF-782, CF-760
SCENARIO: Go variant generated without tenantId filter in SearchDocuments call.
EXPECTED: AF-7 DNA-5 scan detects missing tenantId; CF-782 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Variant returns results from multiple tenants.
RECOVERY: Regenerate; inject tenantId from context.Context in all fabric calls.
```

### ST-467: WordPress Plugin Missing permission_callback
```
TEST: ST-467
NAME: WordPress Plugin Missing permission_callback
TESTS: CF-767
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates register_rest_route without permission_callback key.
EXPECTED: AF-7 + AF-8 detect missing callback; CF-767 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Plugin REST endpoint is publicly accessible without auth check.
RECOVERY: Regenerate T556 with CF-767 enforced; add permission_callback.
```

### ST-468: Canonical Spec Generated Without Golden Tests
```
TEST: ST-468
NAME: Canonical Spec Generated Without Golden Tests
TESTS: CF-751, IRON-543-3
SCENARIO: T543 completes extraction but goldenTests array has only 1 scenario (less than required 3).
EXPECTED: AF-9 judge rejects spec; IRON-543-3 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Incomplete spec accepted; variants generated without adequate test coverage.
RECOVERY: Return to T543; AF-1 generates additional negative and edge case scenarios.
```

### ST-469: Variant Promoted Before Conformance Complete
```
TEST: ST-469
NAME: Variant Promoted Before Conformance Complete
TESTS: CF-775
SCENARIO: Admin manually triggers T560 (promotion gate) for Node variant before T559 (conformance runner) completes.
EXPECTED: F1476 promotion gate checks F1440 conformance status = null; blocks promotion; returns DataProcessResult[failure].
FAILURE MODE: Variant reaches INJECTED without test validation.
RECOVERY: Queue retry of T560 after T559 completion event received.
```

### ST-470: Duplicate Canonical Family Registration
```
TEST: ST-470
NAME: Duplicate Canonical Family Registration
TESTS: CF-752
SCENARIO: Admin triggers T543 for SK-69 which already has a canonical spec at v1.
EXPECTED: F1430 registry check detects duplicate; returns DataProcessResult[failure] with "family already registered at version v1".
FAILURE MODE: Second canonical spec created for same family ID.
RECOVERY: Route to version bump flow (T543 creates v2 of existing spec, not a new family).
```

### ST-471: Go Variant Uses Typed Struct for Domain Object
```
TEST: ST-471
NAME: Go Variant Uses Typed Struct for Domain Object
TESTS: CF-758, IRON-547-1
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates Go adapter with: type OrderDocument struct { ID str; Amount float64 } — typed domain struct.
EXPECTED: AF-7 detects non-map document type; CF-758 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Typed struct passes into Go module artifact.
RECOVERY: Regenerate; enforce map[str]interface{} for domain documents.
```

### ST-472: WordPress Theme Contains Direct $wpdb Query
```
TEST: ST-472
NAME: WordPress Theme Contains Direct $wpdb Query
TESTS: CF-770
SCENARIO: Theme functions.php generated with $wpdb->get_results() call for displaying content.
EXPECTED: AF-7 scans theme PHP files for $wpdb; CF-770 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Theme queries database directly, bypassing fabric and tenant scope.
RECOVERY: Remove query; route display data through REST API call to XIIGen or plugin.
```

### ST-473: React Client tenantId from Form Field
```
TEST: ST-473
NAME: React Client tenantId from Form Field
TESTS: CF-760, IRON-552-2
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates React hook that reads tenantId from a form input field value.
EXPECTED: AF-8 detects tenantId sourced from form; CF-760 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: User can spoof tenantId by manipulating form field.
RECOVERY: Regenerate; source tenantId exclusively from useAuth() hook.
```

### ST-474: Rust Variant Uses unsafe{} in Business Logic
```
TEST: ST-474
NAME: Rust Variant Uses unsafe{} in Business Logic
TESTS: CF-761, IRON-549-2
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates Rust adapter with unsafe { raw_ptr_to_string(ptr) } in payload parsing logic.
EXPECTED: AF-8 security scan detects unsafe block; CF-761 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Unsafe Rust code in production variant creates memory safety risk.
RECOVERY: Regenerate T549; AF-1 prompt enforces no unsafe blocks.
```

### ST-475: Graph RAG Ingestion of GENERATED Variant
```
TEST: ST-475
NAME: Graph RAG Ingestion of GENERATED Variant
TESTS: CF-781
SCENARIO: T561 triggered for Node variant at GENERATED status (conformance not yet run).
EXPECTED: F1471 checks F1440 maturity = GENERATED; rejects ingestion; returns DataProcessResult[failure].
FAILURE MODE: Unstable variant node appears in graph; AF-4 retrieval returns unvalidated variant.
RECOVERY: Queue T561 retry after T560 promotes variant to INJECTED.
```

### ST-476: CORE Promotion Without Human Approval
```
TEST: ST-476
NAME: CORE Promotion Without Human Approval
TESTS: CF-786
SCENARIO: Automated promotion pipeline calls T560 for MINIMAL → CORE transition without approved_by field.
EXPECTED: F1477 checks for approved_by; absent → blocks; publishes PromotionPendingApproval event.
FAILURE MODE: Variant reaches CORE status without human review.
RECOVERY: Admin must explicitly approve via admin interface; F1477 then allows transition.
```

### ST-477: PHP eval() in Generated WordPress Plugin
```
TEST: ST-477
NAME: PHP eval() in Generated WordPress Plugin
TESTS: CF-762
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates plugin PHP with dynamic dispatch using eval($functionName.'($payload)').
EXPECTED: AF-8 PHP token analysis detects eval(); CF-762 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: eval() in plugin creates remote code execution risk.
RECOVERY: Regenerate T556; implement dynamic dispatch using match/switch on allowed action names.
```

### ST-478: Java @RestController Per Entity Type
```
TEST: ST-478
NAME: Java @RestController Per Entity Type
TESTS: CF-754, IRON-548-2
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates Java adapter with OrderController, CustomerController, ProductController — separate controllers per entity.
EXPECTED: AF-7 detects multiple @RestController classes; CF-754 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Entity-specific controllers violate DynamicController DNA.
RECOVERY: Merge into single @RestController @RequestMapping("/{tenantId}/dynamic").
```

### ST-479: Cross-Language API Path Divergence
```
TEST: ST-479
NAME: Cross-Language API Path Divergence
TESTS: CF-753
SCENARIO: Node variant uses /api/dynamic/{tenantId}/{action}. Go variant generated with /api/v1/go/{tenantId}/{action}.
EXPECTED: T551 (cross-language judge) + F1469 API conformance checker detects path divergence; CF-753 BUILD_FAILURE for Go variant.
FAILURE MODE: Clients targeting different routes for different languages — breaks fabric-first.
RECOVERY: Regenerate Go variant with DynamicRouter pattern (SK-358).
```

### ST-480: Vue Composable Resets idempotencyKey on Retry
```
TEST: ST-480
NAME: Vue Composable Resets idempotencyKey on Retry
TESTS: CF-776, SK-377
SCENARIO: Generated Vue composable calls idempotencyKey = ref(uuidv4()) inside the submit function (not in setup). Each call generates a new key.
EXPECTED: AF-9 + conformance GT-03 detects idempotency broken; IRON-553-2 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: User retries → duplicate operation created on server (idempotency broken).
RECOVERY: Regenerate T553; idempotencyKey created in composable setup() — not inside submit.
```

### ST-481: WordPress Plugin Stores API Token in Options
```
TEST: ST-481
NAME: WordPress Plugin Stores API Token in Options
TESTS: CF-768, CF-784
SCENARIO: Generated plugin settings registration includes 'xiigen_api_token' option that stores full JWT in wp_options.
EXPECTED: AF-8 detects secret option name pattern; CF-768 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: API token exposed in database and admin UI.
RECOVERY: Remove token option; implement auth via WP Application Passwords or server-managed session.
```

### ST-482: Node Variant require('ioredis') Direct Call
```
TEST: ST-482
NAME: Node Variant Direct ioredis Import
TESTS: CF-756
SCENARIO: Generated Node adapter: const redis = require('ioredis'); const client = Redis({...}).
EXPECTED: AF-7 detects 'ioredis' in require() call; CF-756 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Direct Redis driver bypasses QUEUE FABRIC; cannot swap to Kafka or SQS without code changes.
RECOVERY: Replace with IQueueService.EnqueueAsync via fabric injection.
```

### ST-483: Canonical Suite Modified During Active Generation
```
TEST: ST-483
NAME: Canonical Suite Modified During Active Generation
TESTS: CF-778
SCENARIO: Admin updates golden test vectors while T547 (Go), T548 (Java) still running.
EXPECTED: F1466 detects active generation lock; returns DataProcessResult[failure] "suite locked during active generation". Suite update queued.
FAILURE MODE: Variants tested against different test versions; cross-language comparison invalid.
RECOVERY: Update applied after all active T25x tasks complete; T559 re-run.
```

### ST-484: Rust Adapter Box<dyn> Fabric Interface Missing
```
TEST: ST-484
NAME: Rust Adapter Fabric Interface Missing
TESTS: CF-756, IRON-549-3
SCENARIO: Rust adapter instantiates sqlx::PgPool directly instead of receiving Box<dyn IDatabaseService>.
EXPECTED: AF-7 detects sqlx direct usage; CF-756 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Rust variant tightly coupled to PostgreSQL; cannot swap DB provider.
RECOVERY: Regenerate T549; inject Box<dyn IDatabaseService> as trait object.
```

### ST-485: Angular HttpInterceptor Missing tenantId Header
```
TEST: ST-485
NAME: Angular HttpInterceptor Missing tenantId Header
TESTS: CF-760, IRON-554-1
SCENARIO: Generated Angular component injects tenantId via component-level @Input() property instead of HttpInterceptor.
EXPECTED: AF-7 detects component-level tenantId injection; CF-760 + IRON-554-1 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: tenantId injection inconsistent; components can be used without tenant context.
RECOVERY: Regenerate T554; HttpInterceptor must inject tenantId header from AuthService.
```

### ST-486: PHP Adapter PDO() in Service
```
TEST: ST-486
NAME: PHP Adapter Direct PDO Instantiation
TESTS: CF-756
SCENARIO: PHP service adapter: $db = PDO('pgsql:host=localhost;dbname=xiigen', $user, $pass).
EXPECTED: AF-7 detects PDO(); CF-756 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: Direct DB access; bypasses IDatabaseService fabric; secrets in code.
RECOVERY: Inject $databaseService via DI container; use $databaseService->searchDocuments($filter).
```

### ST-487: WordPress Block Missing index.asset.php
```
TEST: ST-487
NAME: WordPress Block Missing index.asset.php
TESTS: CF-772
SCENARIO: Plugin block generated with custom webpack but doesn't produce index.asset.php.
EXPECTED: T556 packaging gate checks for index.asset.php in build/; absent = BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: WordPress cannot resolve block script dependencies; fatal error on activation.
RECOVERY: Regenerate block using @wordpress/scripts (wp-scripts build); produces index.asset.php automatically.
```

### ST-488: Promotion Rollback Deletes Audit Record
```
TEST: ST-488
NAME: Promotion Rollback Attempts to Delete Audit Record
TESTS: CF-785
SCENARIO: Failed CORE promotion triggers rollback. Admin requests deletion of the failed promotion record.
EXPECTED: F1479 rejects DELETE operation; returns DataProcessResult[failure] "audit records are immutable". Rollback creates new ROLLBACK record instead.
FAILURE MODE: Audit trail manipulated; compliance violated.
```

### ST-489: Multi-Target Translation Orchestrator Resume After Crash
```
TEST: ST-489
NAME: Multi-Target Translation Orchestrator Resume
TESTS: IRON-564-4 (T564 resumability)
SCENARIO: T564 running parallel T547+T548+T549. Server crashes after T547 complete, T548 mid-run, T549 not started.
EXPECTED: On restart, F1481 trace shows T547=DONE, T548=INTERRUPTED, T549=PENDING. Orchestrator resumes: re-runs T548 from checkpoint, starts T549. Does not re-run T547.
FAILURE MODE: All tasks re-run from scratch on restart.
```

### ST-490: Graph Edge ALTERNATIVE_OF Within Family
```
TEST: ST-490
NAME: Graph Edge ALTERNATIVE_OF Bidirectional Within Family
TESTS: T562, SK-372
SCENARIO: SK-69 has variants: #server#node, #server#go, #server#java. Graph edges must include ALTERNATIVE_OF between all three.
EXPECTED: F1472 creates ALTERNATIVE_OF edges: node↔go, node↔java, go↔java (undirected).
FAILURE MODE: Edges missing; graph query returns only one variant instead of all alternatives.
```

### ST-491: Variant Selector Returns Fallback Recipe
```
TEST: ST-491
NAME: Variant Selector Returns Fallback When No Exact Match
TESTS: T563, CF-781
SCENARIO: AF-4 requests SK-69 with targetServer=go, but SK-69#server#go does not yet exist in graph.
EXPECTED: F1473 graph query returns null for exact match. F1442 fallback returns: {variantExists: false, canonicalSpec: SK-69-canonical-v1, adapterRecipe: "Run T547 to generate Go variant"}.
FAILURE MODE: AF-4 errors or returns wrong variant.
```

### ST-492: Cross-Flow BFA — FLOW-34 Factory Conflicts with Prior Flow
```
TEST: ST-492
NAME: FLOW-34 Factory Registry Conflict Check
TESTS: CF-780
SCENARIO: Verify F1429–F1483 do not overlap with any F1–F630 from prior flows.
EXPECTED: Registry check on all new factory IDs returns no conflicts. Session state confirms F630 as last pre-FLOW-34 factory.
FAILURE MODE: Any FLOW-34 factory ID falls in F1–F630 range.
```

### ST-493: WordPress Theme Companion Plugin Not INJECTED
```
TEST: ST-493
NAME: WordPress Theme Promoted Without INJECTED Companion Plugin
TESTS: CF-788
SCENARIO: Theme variant at GENERATED requires companion plugin. Plugin variant still at GENERATED. Admin triggers T560 for theme.
EXPECTED: F1477 checks companion plugin status = GENERATED; blocks theme promotion; returns DataProcessResult[failure].
FAILURE MODE: Theme at INJECTED but companion plugin at GENERATED; theme has broken REST dependency.
```

### ST-494: Java @Entity Used for Domain Object
```
TEST: ST-494
NAME: Java Variant Uses @Entity for Domain Object
TESTS: CF-758, IRON-548-1
SCENARIO: AF-1 generates Java adapter with @Entity class OrderDocument.
EXPECTED: AF-7 detects @Entity annotation on domain class; CF-758 BUILD_FAILURE.
FAILURE MODE: JPA entity tied to specific DB schema; breaks fabric-first DB swap.
RECOVERY: Replace with Map<str,Object>; remove @Entity, @Column annotations.
```

### ST-495: CloudEvents specversion Missing from Event
```
TEST: ST-495
NAME: CloudEvents Required Attribute Missing
TESTS: CF-787, SK-368
SCENARIO: Node variant publishes event: {"id": "...", "source": "...", "type": "..."} — missing specversion.
EXPECTED: F1470 event envelope validator detects missing specversion; CF-787 BUILD_FAILURE; event not published.
FAILURE MODE: Non-conformant events corrupt event bus routing.
RECOVERY: Regenerate event publisher in Node variant with full CloudEvents envelope.
```

### ST-496: Angular Retry Generates New idempotencyKey
```
TEST: ST-496
NAME: Angular Retry Generates New idempotencyKey
TESTS: SK-377, CF-776
SCENARIO: Angular service generates new UUID every time submit() is called, including on retry.
EXPECTED: Conformance GT-03 fails: two calls with different keys are treated as different requests on server.
FAILURE MODE: User retry creates duplicate operation.
RECOVERY: Regenerate T554; idempotencyKey stored as private service field; reset only on explicit "start over".
```

### ST-497: Full Translation Flow — End-to-End Stress
```
TEST: ST-497
NAME: Full Multi-Target Translation — End-to-End
TESTS: T543→T564 full chain
SCENARIO: Admin triggers T564 for SK-69 with targets: server=[node,go,java], client=[reactjs, angular], wordpress=[plugin].
EXPECTED:
  1. T543: Canonical spec extracted with 3+ golden tests ✓
  2. T544: Variant descriptors attached ✓
  3. T545: Conformance suite seeded with 3 scenarios ✓
  4. T546,T547,T548 parallel: Node, Go, Java adapters generated; all DNA compliant ✓
  5. T552, T554 parallel: React, Angular client adapters generated ✓
  6. T556: WordPress plugin packaged with all IRON rules satisfied ✓
  7. T551: Cross-language judge: all server variants pass with 100% conformance ✓
  8. T555: Client fabric compliance gate: all client variants pass ✓
  9. T558: WordPress security gate: pass ✓
  10. T559: Cross-variant conformance runner: all 3 scenarios × 6 variants = 100% ✓
  11. T560: Variants promoted to INJECTED (human approval queued for CORE) ✓
  12. F1481 trace: complete audit trail with all task IDs and timestamps ✓
FAILURE MODE: Any step produces BUILD_FAILURE or variant left at GENERATED after all others promoted.
ESTIMATED DURATION: 45-90 minutes (AI generation steps are longest)
```

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FLOW-35 BFA RULES & STRESS TESTS: CF-789–CF-790, ST-498–ST-499
# Added: 2026-03-05
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

## BFA CONFLICT RULES (CF-789–CF-790)

### CF-789 — SECRET PATH COLLISION ACROSS TENANTS
```
RULE: CF-789
NAME: Secret Path Collision Across Tenants
SEVERITY: CRITICAL
TRIGGER: Two tenants request same AWS Secrets Manager path without tenant-scoped prefix
FACTORY: F1484 (ISecretsService), F1485 (AWSSecretsManagerProvider)
TASK TYPE: T565 (Secret Resolution Gate)
FLOW: FLOW-35

DETECTION:
  Static: Scan config templates for $secret: paths without {tenant_id} segment
  Dynamic: At runtime, SecretsFabricResolver validates tenant_id prefix on every path

BLAST RADIUS:
  - Tenant A reads Tenant B's secrets → SECURITY BREACH
  - All downstream fabrics initialized with wrong credentials

RESOLUTION OPTIONS:
  1. REFACTOR: Add tenant_id prefix to all secret paths (xiigen/{tenant_id}/ai/anthropic_key)
  2. REJECT: Block config templates without tenant-scoped paths
  3. COMPAT_WRAPPER: Not applicable (security issue)
  4. FORCE_PROCEED: BLOCKED — security violation cannot be overridden

IRON RULE: Secret paths MUST include tenant_id segment. Violation = BUILD FAILURE.
```

### CF-790 — CONFIG RESOLUTION FAILURE CASCADE
```
RULE: CF-790
NAME: Config Resolution Failure Cascade
SEVERITY: HIGH
TRIGGER: ConfigBuilder fails to resolve one or more $secret: references during bootstrap
FACTORY: F1487 (ConfigBuilder), F1489 (BootstrapSequence)
TASK TYPE: T565, T566
FLOW: FLOW-35

DETECTION:
  Static: Verify all $secret: paths in config template exist in secrets provider
  Dynamic: BootstrapSequence Phase 2 reports partial resolution failures

BLAST RADIUS:
  - Unresolved AI provider key → that provider unavailable (DEGRADED)
  - Unresolved DB host → database fabric DOWN
  - Unresolved queue config → queue fabric DOWN
  - All unresolved → system DOWN

RESOLUTION OPTIONS:
  1. REFACTOR: Add missing secrets to provider
  2. REJECT: Block bootstrap until all secrets available
  3. COMPAT_WRAPPER: Use fallback provider (env vars for dev)
  4. FORCE_PROCEED: Allowed if secrets_required=false (DEGRADED mode)

MACHINE: Partial failure = DEGRADED status, not crash
FREEDOM: secrets_required flag (true = abort on any failure; false = continue degraded)
```

---

## STRESS TESTS (ST-498–ST-499)

### ST-498 — SECRET RESOLUTION UNDER CONCURRENT LOAD
```
STRESS TEST: ST-498
NAME: Secret Resolution Under Concurrent Load
RULE: CF-789
FACTORY: F1484, F1485, F1487
TASK TYPE: T565
FLOW: FLOW-35

SCENARIO:
  50 concurrent tenants each resolve 10 $secret: references simultaneously
  Total: 500 secret resolution calls in parallel

ASSERTIONS:
  1. All 500 calls return DataProcessResult (no exceptions)
  2. Each tenant receives only their own secrets (tenant isolation verified)
  3. Cache hit rate > 80% after first batch
  4. No secret value appears in any log output
  5. Response time P99 < 500ms (with caching)

SETUP:
  InMemorySecretsProvider pre-loaded with 50 tenants × 10 secrets each
  ConfigBuilder cache TTL = 60s (test duration < TTL)

PASS CRITERIA: All 5 assertions pass. FAIL on any tenant isolation breach.
```

### ST-499 — BOOTSTRAP WITH PARTIAL SECRET FAILURE
```
STRESS TEST: ST-499
NAME: Bootstrap With Partial Secret Failure
RULE: CF-790
FACTORY: F1489, F1490, F1484, F1487
TASK TYPE: T566
FLOW: FLOW-35

SCENARIO:
  Bootstrap with 5 AI providers configured, but Grok secret path missing.
  Expected: System boots to DEGRADED (not crash), 4/5 AI providers available.

ASSERTIONS:
  1. BootstrapSequence completes without exception
  2. Overall health = DEGRADED (not DOWN, not HEALTHY)
  3. AI Engine Fabric health = DEGRADED
  4. Available AI providers = [Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Mock] (4 of 5)
  5. Missing provider report includes: "Grok — secret resolution failed for xiigen/ai/grok_key"
  6. Database, Queue, RAG, Flow Engine fabrics = HEALTHY (unaffected)
  7. Secrets Fabric itself = HEALTHY (provider works, the key just doesn't exist)
  8. scope_id present on all health check calls
  9. No provider SDK imports in bootstrap module (fabric purity)

PASS CRITERIA: All 9 assertions pass. FAIL if bootstrap crashes or if unaffected fabrics show non-HEALTHY.
```

---

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BFA RULES — NestJS Implementation (FLOW-15..24 + FLOW-36)
# Added: 2026-04-14 | Source: server/src/engine-contracts/*-bfa-rules.ts
# Format: Flow-scoped IDs (CF-XX-N where XX=flow number, N=sequence)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# FLOW-15..24: Each flow has 4 BFA rules (CF-XX-1 through CF-XX-4)
# covering: OCC/state conflict, data isolation, outbox pattern, idempotency.

## FLOW-15 BFA RULES (saas-multi-tenancy): CF-15-1..CF-15-4
```
CF-15-1: Tenant provisioning idempotency — duplicate provision request must return existing tenant
CF-15-2: OCC conflict on tenant config — concurrent config updates must fail gracefully
CF-15-3: Quota materialization ordering — quotas allocated AFTER tenant document stored
CF-15-4: Lifecycle state machine — invalid transitions (e.g., SUSPENDED→ACTIVE without approval) rejected
```

## FLOW-16 BFA RULES (marketplace-payments): CF-16-1..CF-16-4
```
CF-16-1: Inventory reservation OCC — storeDocumentWithOCC for checkout inventory lock
CF-16-2: Payment split atomicity — platform + seller splits must sum to total
CF-16-3: Escrow state machine — only valid transitions: HELD→RELEASED, HELD→REFUNDED
CF-16-4: Payout scheduling idempotency — duplicate payout requests deduplicated
```

## FLOW-17 BFA RULES (freelancer-marketplace): CF-17-1..CF-17-4
```
CF-17-1: Gig acceptance lock — SETNX prevents double-booking
CF-17-2: Milestone OCC — storeDocumentWithOCC for milestone state transitions
CF-17-3: Delivery escrow release ordering — verification BEFORE release
CF-17-4: Review participant validation — only delivery participants can review
```

## FLOW-18 BFA RULES (visual-flow-engine): CF-18-1..CF-18-4
```
CF-18-1: Canvas node validation ordering — validate BEFORE save (ORDER 2)
CF-18-2: Publication OCC — storeDocumentWithOCC for DRAFT→PUBLISHED
CF-18-3: Node type registration uniqueness — duplicate types rejected
CF-18-4: Code injection scope — flow.status==='PUBLISHED' check ORDER 1, lock includes tenantId
```

## FLOW-19 BFA RULES (durable-sagas-compliance): CF-19-1..CF-19-4
```
CF-19-1: Saga checkpoint idempotency — duplicate checkpoint writes are no-ops
CF-19-2: Compensation ordering — compensations execute in reverse order of saga steps
CF-19-3: Audit trail immutability — audit records cannot be modified after creation
CF-19-4: Retention policy enforcement — deletion only after retention period expires
```

## FLOW-20 BFA RULES (ads-platform): CF-20-1..CF-20-4
```
CF-20-1: Consent gate ordering — consent check BEFORE any ad serving
CF-20-2: Bid auction isolation — concurrent auctions must not interfere
CF-20-3: Fraud signal propagation — fraud flag BEFORE billing write
CF-20-4: Political content review — review BEFORE publication (mandatory for political ads)
```

## FLOW-21 BFA RULES (dynamic-forms-workflows): CF-21-1..CF-21-4
```
CF-21-1: Form schema publication OCC — storeDocumentWithOCC for schema versions
CF-21-2: Submission validation ordering — validate BEFORE process
CF-21-3: Automation dispatch SETNX — rule execution lock per (submissionId, ruleId)
CF-21-4: Analytics isolation — submission analytics are PII-free
```

## FLOW-22 BFA RULES (cms-publishing): CF-22-1..CF-22-4
```
CF-22-1: Content version OCC — storeDocumentWithOCC for DRAFT→PUBLISHED
CF-22-2: Approval workflow ordering — all approvers must approve before publication
CF-22-3: Schedule dispatch timing — scheduled content published at exact time
CF-22-4: Analytics aggregation isolation — content metrics are tenant-scoped
```

## FLOW-23 BFA RULES (form-builder-templates): CF-23-1..CF-23-4
```
CF-23-1: Template schema validation ordering — JSON Schema validation ORDER 1
CF-23-2: Template version OCC — storeDocumentWithOCC for version publication
CF-23-3: Instantiation SETNX lock — template instantiation lock per templateId
CF-23-4: Usage analytics PII-free — no personal data in usage metrics
```

## FLOW-24 BFA RULES (ai-safety-moderation): CF-24-1..CF-24-4
```
CF-24-1: Consent gate ordering — consent check BEFORE any AI content generation
CF-24-2: Safety gate mandatory — all AI-generated content passes safety review
CF-24-3: Client score rejection — quiz grade from client rejected, server recomputes (DD-226)
CF-24-4: Streak timezone — timezone from F982 factory only, never from client (DD-223)
```

## FLOW-36 BFA RULES (feature-registry): CF-808, CF-809, CF-813
```
CF-808: portingCandidate=false → PROHIBITED decision; PortingCostEstimator must not run
  TYPE: PROHIBITED_GUARD | SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
CF-809: PROHIBITED guard is synchronous and checked first in PortingDecisionGate body
  TYPE: ORDERING | SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
CF-813: portingCandidate is MACHINE — tenant config cannot override classification
  TYPE: MACHINE_CONSTRAINT | SEVERITY: BUILD_FAILURE
```

---

## BFA VALIDATION IN ACTUAL CODEBASE

All BFA rules are:
1. Defined in `server/src/engine-contracts/{slug}-bfa-rules.ts` as typed arrays
2. Seeded to Elasticsearch by `server/src/bootstrap/engine-bootstrapper.ts` in `seedBfaRules()`
3. Validated at build time by the BFA cross-flow governance engine (FLOW-25)
4. Each rule has: ruleId, flowId, type, description, violationSeverity, connectionType, knowledgeScope
5. Arbiter fixtures in `fixtures/arbiters/{slug}-arbiters.bulk.ndjson` (NDJSON format with scope_isolation)
